content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_OpenOrdersByStatus
 --drop view v_OpenOrdersByStatus
as

SELECT      A.*
,           CASE WHEN [Quantity] > 0 then 'Sales' else 'Returns' end as [Sales Type]
/*,           B.[Expected Arrival Date]*/
,           COALESCE (C.CUA1, D.CUA12, A.[Address 1]) AS [Ship to Address 1]
,           COALESCE (C.CUA2, D.CUA22, A.[Adddress 2]) AS [Ship to Address 2]
,           COALESCE (C.TOWN, D.TOWN2, A.[City]) AS [Ship to City]
,           COALESCE (C.PONO, D.PONO2, A.[Zip Code]) AS [Ship to Zip]
,           COALESCE (C.ECAR, D.ECAR2, A.[State]) AS [Ship to State]
,           COALESCE (C.CSCD, D.CSCD2, A.Country) AS [Ship to Country]

/*
,           NULL as CUNO
,           NULL AS [Address ID 2], NULL as CUNM2
,           NULL AS CUA12
,           NULL AS CUA22
,           NULL AS TOWN2
,           NULL AS PONO2
,           NULL AS ECAR2
,           NULL AS CSCD2
,           E.ARDN as [PO Number]
*/

,           [Overdue Invoice Amount]
,           [Overdue Days]
,           [Outstanding Invoice Amount]
,           [Outstanding Orders Not Invoiced]
FROM
(
SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) <= EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())) THEN '2 - Backordered'
            WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) > EOMONTH(GETDATE()) THEN '2 - Future Order' else '2 - Current Month Backorder' end as [Qty Status]
,           CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) <= EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())) THEN 'Backordered' 
            WHEN (CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) end) > EOMONTH(GETDATE()) THEN 'Future Order' else 'Current Month Backorder' end as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN OL.ORQT/2
            /*WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN OL.ORQT/2*/ ELSE OL.ORQT END as [Order Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN OL.RNQT/2 
            /*WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN OL.RNQT/2*/ ELSE OL.RNQT END as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
LEFT JOIN   v_CurrencyConversion CC ON OH.CUCD = CC.CUCD
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '79'
AND         OL.RNQT > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '3 - Allocated' as [Qty Status]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Shippable - Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Shippable - Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '0' then 'Released to DCs'
            ELSE 'Shippable - Released to Logistics' END as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           OL.ORQT as [Order Quantity]
,           OL.ALQT as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
LEFT JOIN   v_CurrencyConversion CC ON OH.CUCD = CC.CUCD
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '79'
AND         OL.ALQT > 0


UNION ALL

SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '4 - Waived/Pick' as [Qty Status]
,           'Released to DCs' as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           OL.ORQT as [Order Quantity]
,           OL.PLQT as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
LEFT JOIN   v_CurrencyConversion CC ON OH.CUCD = CC.CUCD
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '79'
AND         OL.PLQT > 0


UNION ALL

SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '6 - Shipped' as [Qty Status]
,           'Released to DCs' as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           OL.ORQT as [Order Quantity]
,           OL.DLQT as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
LEFT JOIN   v_CurrencyConversion CC ON OH.CUCD = CC.CUCD
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '79'
AND         OL.DLQT > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT 'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '7 - Invoiced' as [Qty Status]
,           'Invoiced' as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           LE.CINO as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)  as [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 WHEN LE.CINO = '2999910570' then 451 ELSE OL.SAPR*LE.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           /*CASE WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN OL.ORQT/2 ELSE */OL.ORQT /*END*/ as [Order Quantity]
,           /*CASE WHEN OL.ITNO LIKE 'VINO-CUSTOM%' THEN ODL.IVQT/2 ELSE*/ ODL.IVQT /*END*/ as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           ETRN as [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE 
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN 
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.CUNO = ODH.CUNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
--LEFT JOIN    (SELECT DISTINCT DLIX, SORT, ETRN FROM M3.MPTRNS) MT on ODH.DLIX = MT.DLIX and OL.ITNO = MT.SORT
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
AND             LE.CINO not in ('2400163940', '2999910397', '2999910571', '2400083573', '2400083579', '2400083575', '2400088771'
                                , '2400088775', '2400088773', '2400088788', '2400102150', '2400081300', '2400068696', '2400060092', '2400163926'
                                , '2400053326', '2400052745', '2400052544', '2400052542', '2400053348', '2400053347', '2400052543', '2400054060',
                                '2400054065', '2400053659', '2400060082', '2400060083', '2400054063', '2400054064', '2400053660', '2400058368',
                                '2400058376', '2400058378', '2400058380', '2400058374', '2400058366', '2400058382', '2400058372', '2400058358',
                                '2400058362', '2400058364', '2400058356',  '2400058360', '2400058384', '2400058370'
)

UNION ALL

SELECT      'M3' as ERP
,           OL.ORST as [Line Status]
,           OH.OBLC as [Order Stop Code]
,           CASE WHEN OH.OBLC in (0, 9) then 'No Stop Code'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '3' then 'Credit Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '7' then 'Manual Hold'
            WHEN OH.OBLC = '8' then 'Released to DCs'
            else 'NA' end as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '9 - Cancelled' as [Qty Status]
,           'Cancelled' as [Bridge Category]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           CASE WHEN OC.PYNO = '' then OC.CUNO else OC.PYNO END AS [Payer]
,           OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,           OC.CRL3 as [Credit Limit]
,           OC.SMCD as SalesRep
,           CS4.TX40 as SalesRepName
,           OC.RESP as Territory
,           OH.RESP as [OrderEntryUser]
,           OC.SDST as [Buying Group]
,           OH.ADID as [Address ID]
,           OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,           OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,           OC.TOWN as [City]
,           OC.ECAR as [State]
,           OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
,           OC.PHNO as [Phone Number]
,           OC.CUA4 as [Country]
,           CS.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           CS2.TX15  as [Cash Terms]
,           CS3.TX15  as [Freight Terms]
,           OH.UCA7 AS [Carrier]
,           OH.ORNO as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
,           OH.RESP as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           OH.ORTP as [Order Type]
,           OL.RGDT as [Line Entry Date]
,           OH.RGDT as [Order Entry Date]
,           OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           OL.DWDZ as [Required Delivery Date]
,           CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) as [Updated Requested Date]
,           CASE WHEN CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date) is NULL then OH.RLDT else CAST(CAST(NULLIF(OH.UID1,0) as varchar(max)) as date)  end as [Expected Ship Date]
,           OH.FDED as [First Date]
,           OH.LDED as [Last Date]
,           CASE WHEN OL.WHLO IN ('DFF', 'DIW') THEN OL.DWDZ ELSE NULL END as [DI Date]
,           NULL AS [Inv Date]
,           IM.Brand as [Brand]
,           IM.Division as [Division]
,           IM.[Finance Brand] as [Finance Brand]
,           OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,           OL.POSX as [Line Suffix]
,           OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,           IM.Description as [Item Name]
,           OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,           CASE WHEN IM.[Finance Brand] = 'Admiral Craft' and OL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE OL.SAPR*CC.ARAT END as [Unit Price]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN OL.ORQT/2 ELSE OL.ORQT END as [Order Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OH.ORNO = '1000100117' THEN (OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT)/2 ELSE OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT END as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN OC.OREF = 'TLC INTERCOMPANY' then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           OH.UCA9 as [Shipping Method]
,           NULL AS [DS Flag]
--,           NULL AS [Tracking Number]
--,           OL.RSC6 as [Reason Code]
--,           CS5.TX40 as [Reason Code Description]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH 
JOIN        M3.OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OL.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on OL.ITNO = IM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEPY') CS on OC.TEPY = CS.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TECD') CS2 on OC.TECD = CS2.STKY
LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX15 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'TEDL') CS3 on OC.TEDL = CS3.STKY
LEFT JOIN	(SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'SMCD') CS4 on OC.SMCD = CS4.STKY
--LEFT JOIN   (SELECT DISTINCT STKY, TX40 FROM M3.CSYTAB WHERE STCO = 'RSCD') CS5 on OL.RSCD = CS5.STKY
LEFT JOIN   v_CurrencyConversion CC ON OH.CUCD = CC.CUCD
WHERE       OL.ORST BETWEEN '22' and '99'
AND         OL.ORQT - OL.RNQT - OL.ALQT - OL.PLQT - OL.DLQT - OL.IVQT > 0

/*
UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT 'Visual' as ERP
,           COL.LINE_STATUS as [Line Status]
,           0 as [Order Stop Code]
,           'No Stop Code' as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '3 - Allocated' as [Qty Status]
,           CASE WHEN COL.LINE_STATUS = 'H' then 'Shippable - Manual Hold'
            ELSE 'Released to DCs' end as [Bridge Category]
,           C.ID as [Customer Number]
,           C.ID as [Payer]
,           C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,           NULL as [Credit Limit]
,           C.SALESREP_ID as SalesRep
,           NULL as SalesRepName
,           C.TERRITORY as Territory
,           NULL as [OrderEntryUser]
,           NULL as [Buying Group]
,           CO.SHIPTO_ID as [Address ID]
,           C.ADDR_1 as [Address 1]
,           C.ADDR_2 as [Adddress 2]
,           C.CITY as [City]
,           C.STATE as [State]
,           ZIPCODE as [Zip Code]
,           C.CONTACT_PHONE as [Phone Number]
,           C.COUNTRY as [Country]
,           C.TERMS_DESCRIPTION as [Payment Terms]
,           CAST(C.TERMS_DISC_DAYS AS VARCHAR(MAX))+' '+CAST(C.TERMS_DISC_PERCENT AS VARCHAR(MAX)) as [Cash Terms]
,           C.FREIGHT_TERMS  as [Freight Terms]
,           co.CARRIER_ID AS [Carrier]
,           CO.ID as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           CO.CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,           NULL as [Order Type]
,           NULL as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           CO.CREATE_DATE as [Line Entry Date]
,           CO.CREATE_DATE as [Order Entry Date]
,           CO.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE as [Requested Date]
,           CO.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE as [Last Date]
,           NULL as [DI Date]
,           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Inv Date]
,           P.USER_1 as Brand
,           P.USER_4 as Division
,           P.PRICE_GROUP as [Finance Brand]
,           COL.LINE_NO as [Line Number]
,           NULL as [Line Suffix]
,           P.ID as [Item Number]
,           P.DESCRIPTION as [Item Name]
,           COL.WAREHOUSE_ID as [Warehouse]
,           COL.UNIT_PRICE as [Unit Price]
,           COL.ORDER_QTY as [Order Quantity]
,           COL.ORDER_QTY as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN C.USER_3 IN ('INTERCOMPANY', 'GWT') then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           NULL as [Shipping Method]
,           C.USER_7 as [DS Flag]
,           NULL as [Tracking Number]
FROM        ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN        ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN        ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID
JOIN        ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE       COL.LINE_STATUS NOT IN ('X', 'C')
AND         CO.STATUS NOT IN ('X', 'C')
AND         COL.ORDER_QTY > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT      DISTINCT 'Visual' as ERP
,           COL.LINE_STATUS as [Line Status]
,           0 as [Order Stop Code]
,           'No Stop Code' as [Order Stop Code Description]
,           '7 - Invoiced' as [Qty Status]
,           'Invoiced' as [Bridge Category]
,           C.ID as [Customer Number]
,           C.ID as [Payer]
,           C.NAME as [Customer Name]
,           NULL as [Credit Limit]
,           C.SALESREP_ID as SalesRep
,           NULL as SalesRepName
,           C.TERRITORY as Territory
,           NULL as [OrderEntryUser]
,           NULL as [Buying Group]
,           CO.SHIPTO_ID as [Address ID]
,           C.ADDR_1 as [Address 1]
,           C.ADDR_2 as [Adddress 2]
,           C.CITY as [City]
,           C.STATE as [State]
,           ZIPCODE as [Zip Code]
,           C.CONTACT_PHONE as [Phone Number]
,           C.COUNTRY as [Country]
,           C.TERMS_DESCRIPTION as [Payment Terms]
,           CAST(C.TERMS_DISC_DAYS AS VARCHAR(MAX))+' '+CAST(C.TERMS_DISC_PERCENT AS VARCHAR(MAX)) as [Cash Terms]
,           C.FREIGHT_TERMS  as [Freight Terms]
,           co.CARRIER_ID AS [Carrier]
,           CO.ID as [Sales Order]
,           NULL as [Invoice Number]
,           CO.CUSTOMER_PO_REF as [Customer PO]
,           NULL as [Order Type]
,           NULL as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,           CO.CREATE_DATE as [Line Entry Date]
,           CO.CREATE_DATE as [Order Entry Date]
,           CO.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE as [Requested Date]
,           CO.DESIRED_SHIP_DATE as [Last Date]
,           NULL as [DI Date]
,           COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE as [Inv Date]
,           P.USER_1 as Brand
,           P.USER_4 as Division
,           P.PRICE_GROUP as [Finance Brand]
,           COL.LINE_NO as [Line Number]
,           NULL as [Line Suffix]
,           P.ID as [Item Number]
,           P.DESCRIPTION as [Item Name]
,           COL.WAREHOUSE_ID as [Warehouse]
,           COL.UNIT_PRICE as [Unit Price]
,           COL.ORDER_QTY as [Order Quantity]
,           COL.ORDER_QTY as [Quantity]
,           CASE WHEN C.USER_3 IN ('INTERCOMPANY', 'GWT') then 'IC' else 'Not IC' end as [IC Flag]
,           NULL as [Shipping Method]
,           C.USER_7 as [DS Flag]
,           NULL as [Tracking Number]
FROM        ECM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN        ECM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL ON CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN        ECM.CUSTOMER C ON CO.CUSTOMER_ID = C.ID
JOIN        ECM.PART P ON COL.PART_ID = P.ID
WHERE       COL.LINE_STATUS IN ('C')

UNION ALL

SELECT			DISTINCT 'Syspro G' as ERP
,               NULL as [Line Status]
,               0 as [Order Stop Code]
,               'No Stop Code' as [Order Stop Code Description]
,               '7 - Invoiced' as [Qty Status]
,               'Invoiced' as [Bridge Category]
,				AC.Customer as [Customer Number]
,               AC.Customer as [Payer]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,               AC.CreditLimit as [Credit Limit]
,               NULL as SalesRep
,               NULL as SalesRepName
,               NULL as Territory
,               NULL as [OrderEntryUser]
,               NULL as [Buying Group]
,               NULL as [Address ID]
,               SM.ShipAddress1 as [Address 1]
,               SM.ShipAddress2 as [Address 2]
,               SM.ShipAddress3 as [City]
,               SM.ShipAddress4 as [State]
,               SM.ShipPostalCode as [Zip Code]
,               AC.Telephone as [Phone Number]
,               SM.ShipAddress5 as [Country]
,               ATS.TermsCode as [Payment Terms]
,               NULL as [Cash Terms]
,               NULL as [Freight Terms]
,               NULL as [Carrier]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Sales Order]
,               ATD.Invoice as [Invoice Number]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,               NULL as [Order Type]
,               NULL as [Sales Admin Responsible]
,               SM.EntrySystemDate as [Line Entry Date]
,               SM.EntrySystemDate as [Order Entry Date]
,               SM.ReqShipDate as [Requested Date]
,               NULL as [Last Date]
,               NULL as [DI Date]
,               ATD.InvoiceDate as [Inv Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,               DF.Division as [Division]
,               CASE WHEN DF.Brand in ('BEVLES') then 'BEV'
                WHEN DF.Brand in ('ADMIRAL CRAFT') then 'ADM'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('AVANTI') THEN 'AVA'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('BLAKESLEE') THEN 'BLA'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('VINOTEMP') THEN 'VIN'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('VINTURI', 'EXCALIBUR', 'ZEROLL', 'OMEGA', 'CHEFS CHOICE', 'WESTBEND', 'YONANAS') THEN 'EDG'
                WHEN DF.Brand IN ('MAXX ICE', 'LEGION', 'GENERAL', 'SAPPHIRE', 'MAXX COLD') THEN 'AFS' END as [Finance Brand]
,               ATD.DetailLine as [Line Number]
,               NULL as [Line Suffix]
,				ISNULL(GV.VisualPartID, ATD.StockCode) as [Item Number]
,				ISNULL(P.Description, IM.Description) as [Item Name]
,               ATD.Warehouse as [Warehouse]
,               ATD.NetSalesValue/NULLIF(ATD.QtyInvoiced,0) as [Unit Price]
,               ATD.QtyInvoiced as [Order Quantity]
,               ATD.QtyInvoiced as [Quantity]
,               'Not IC' as [IC Flag]
,               NULL as [Shipping Method]
,               NULL as [DS Flag]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
LEFT JOIN		SCG.GWT_To_Visual GV on ATD.StockCode = GV.SysproStockCode
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P on GV.VisualPartID = P.ID
LEFT JOIN       SCG.SorMaster SM on ATS.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2023-01-01'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
and             Brand <> 'EMC'
*/
) A
/*
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT *
FROM 
(
SELECT      ML.ITNO as [Item Number], ML.WHLO as [Warehouse], MIN(ML.DWDT) as [Expected Arrival Date]
FROM        M3.MPHEAD MH
JOIN        M3.MPLINE ML ON MH.PUNO = ML.PUNO
WHERE       ML.PUSL BETWEEN '20' and '45'
GROUP BY    ML.ITNO, ML.WHLO
) X
) B         on A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number] and A.[Warehouse] = B.[Warehouse]
*/
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ORNO
,               CUNM
,               CUA1
,               CUA2
,               TOWN
,               PONO
,               ECAR
,               CSCD
FROM            M3.OOADRE
WHERE           ADRT = '1'
) C             on A.[Sales Order] = C.[ORNO]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT CUNO
,               ADID
,               CUNM as CUNM2
,               CUA1 AS CUA12
,               CUA2 AS CUA22
,               TOWN AS TOWN2
,               PONO AS PONO2
,               ECAR AS ECAR2
,               CSCD AS CSCD2
FROM            M3.OCUSAD
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) D             on A.[Customer Number] = D.[CUNO] and A.[Address ID] = D.[ADID]
/*
LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			DISTINCT ARDN, ITNO, WHLO, DRDN
FROM			M3.MPREAL
) E         on A.[Sales Order] = E.DRDN and A.[Item Number] = E.ITNO
*/

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          PYNO as [Payer]
,               ODIN as [Overdue Invoice Amount]
,               NOOD as [Overdue Days]
,               OINA as [Outstanding Invoice Amount]
,               OVNI as [Outstanding Orders Not Invoiced] 
FROM            M3.CCUCRL
) F         on A.[Payer] = F.[Payer]
